notes: Snapshot built from real input files placed in ./inputs.
No synthetic or fallback market data was used.

global_signals.detail: Derived from real world_signals.json US market change input.
Uses the latest downloaded GIFT Nifty change percentage.
Lower crude is treated as supportive for India.
A stronger rupee or softer dollar is treated as supportive.
Foreign investor buying supports the next-session bias.
Domestic investor buying acts as a stabilizer.

notes: Intraday candles are sourced from a combination of Yahoo Finance NIFTYBEES.NS real-time proxy and ^NSEI historical data.
Daily closes, flows, RBI rates, and world/news signals continue to come from the existing real-data pipeline.
Candlestick patterns are detected using the nifty_pattern_detector.py module.

stock_dashboard.provider: Nifty Indices constituent CSV + Yahoo Finance public chart API

Adani Ports and Special Economic Zone Ltd.

notes: Universe membership is downloaded from the official Nifty Indices constituent CSV.
Live component signals are derived from Yahoo Finance 5 minute chart data for each NIFTY 50 stock.

options_volume.provider: NSE Most Active index options by volume CSV
hints: Heavy put activity at 24100 is below/near spot and put premium is falling, so it is treated as support unless broken.
notes: High put/call volume is treated as an activity breakpoint, not as guaranteed buying or writing.
Put-heavy levels below spot can act as support; call-heavy levels above spot can act as resistance.

detected_patterns.name: Falling Wedge
detected_patterns.reason: Price is falling in a narrowing channel, which often warns of downside exhaustion.

all_patterns.name: Inverse Head and Shoulders
all_patterns.reason: A lower middle trough with two shoulders warns of downside exhaustion; neckline breakout adds confirmation.

all_patterns.name: Ascending Triangle
all_patterns.reason: Flat resistance with rising lows shows buyers pressing into supply.

all_patterns.name: Descending Triangle
all_patterns.reason: Flat support with lower highs shows sellers pressing into demand.

all_patterns.name: Symmetrical Triangle
all_patterns.reason: Lower highs and higher lows show volatility compression; trade direction improves after breakout.

all_patterns.name: Rising Wedge
all_patterns.reason: Price is rising in a narrowing channel, which often warns of upside exhaustion.

all_patterns.name: Falling Wedge
all_patterns.reason: Price is falling in a narrowing channel, which often warns of downside exhaustion.

all_patterns.name: Bull Flag
all_patterns.reason: Strong upward impulse followed by shallow consolidation keeps CALL continuation in play.

all_patterns.name: Bear Flag
all_patterns.reason: Strong downward impulse followed by shallow consolidation keeps PUT continuation in play.

all_patterns.name: Cup and Handle
all_patterns.reason: Rounded recovery with shallow handle can support bullish continuation after rim breakout.

all_patterns.name: Trendline Break
all_patterns.reason: Latest close broke a recent swing trendline, improving directional follow-through odds.

notes: Pattern output is a probability layer, not a guaranteed entry.
Use pattern bias with option-volume breakpoints, trend, and stop-loss rules.

detected_patterns.name: Double Top
detected_patterns.reason: Two similar swing highs formed recently without invalidation; a neckline break confirms bearish pressure.
